title: Zero external dependencies — stdlib-only implementation
evidence: go.mod has no require directives; no go.sum file exists. MCP server, CSV parsing, JSON-RPC all implemented with stdlib.
suggestion: No action needed; this is a positive quality signal for maintainability and build reproducibility.

title: go.mod declares non-existent Go version 1.26
evidence: go.mod:3 — 'go 1.26' does not correspond to a released Go version
suggestion: Change to a released Go version (e.g. go 1.22 or go 1.23).

title: Test coverage metric at 51.6% — moderate coverage
evidence: scores.json: test_coverage=0.5157. 22 test functions exist across 2 test files, but code coverage of the source is moderate.
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases in loader.go (malformed CSV rows, missing columns) and normalize.go (more accent/suffix variations).

title: HeadToHead overwrites TeamA/TeamB display name on every match iteration
evidence: internal/soccer/query.go:131-138 — res.TeamA and res.TeamB are reassigned each loop iteration, so the final display names come from whichever match happened to be last.
suggestion: Set display names from the first match only, or choose the most common display form.
